rulings.Case Title: EDWARD PHILLIPS et al VS. AMERICAN ASBESTOS COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 26, 2008 LINE 11. DEFENDANT PACIFIC MECHANICAL CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: HEARING REQUIRED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: ARKADY GORELIK et al VS. MIKHAIL GORELIK et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Hearing On Special Motion To Strike And Special Motion To Strike Eleventh Cause Of Action Of Pltfs' First Amended Complaint; Request To Take Judiocial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 26, 2008 LINE 10. DEFENDANT MIKHAIL GORELIK'S Special Motion To Strike And Special Motion To Strike Eleventh Cause Of Action Of PLAINTIFFS' First Amended Complaint (Request To Take JUDICIAL NOTICE) IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF UNDER C.C.P. SECTION 425.16. THE CENTRAL ALLEGATIONS OF THE COMPLAINT ARE SET FORTH IN PARAGRAPHS 6, 7, 8, 10, 22, 47 AND 52. THIS IS A DISPUTE ABOUT PROPERTY. THE ONLY CONDUCT ALLEGED THAT CONSTITUTES A DEPRIVATION OF PROPERTY IS SET OUT IN PARAGRAPH TEN AND REFERENCES THE FIVE DAY NOTICE AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER ACTION. IN ESSENCE, PLAINTIFF CONTENDS THAT DEFENDANT HAS ENGAGED IN ELDER ABUSE BY SEEKING TO DEPRIVE HIS FATHER OF HIS INTEREST IN REAL PROPERTY BY DEFENDANT ASSERTING A LEGAL CLAIM TO THE PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE A TIMELY FACTUAL RESPONSE AS TO PRONG TWO. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN E LAWRENCE VS. SEAN MCKEAN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Anti-Slapp Motions Of Shawn Mcilvenna; Request For Sanctions, Costs And Fees Pursuant To Ccp 425.16(C); As Against Pltf Stephen E. Lawrence
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 26, 2008 LINE 4. DEFENDANT SHAWN MCILVENNA'S Motion To Anti-Slapp Motions Of Shawn Mcilvenna; Request For Sanctions, Costs And Fees Pursuant To C.C.P. SECTION 425.16(C); As Against PLAINTIFF Stephen E. Lawrence IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 23, 2008. THE COURT REQUIRES THAT THE OPPOSING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH A SET OF COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS. WHEN SUBMITTING THE DUPLICATE COPIES, PLEASE PROVIDE A COVER LETTER TO THE COURT REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE SO THAT THE COURTESY COPIES WON'T BE MISPLACED WHEN RECEIVED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD DONG et al VS. HARRY WOO et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 26, 2008 LINE 6. DEFENDANT HARRY WOO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH FIVE DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NUISANCE. IT IS OVERRULED AS TO ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER ADDRESSES ONLY SOME, BUT NOT ALL OF THE FACTS. EACH OF THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION SETS FORTH ADEQUATE FACTS TO SUPPORT THE CAUSE OF ACTION EVEN IF SOME OF THE CONDUCT IS DEEMED TO BE PRIVILEGED. =(302/PJM/X-CL)

rulings.Case Title: LELAND PORTEOUS DDS et al VS. LAWRENCE PORTEOUS DDS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Judgment;
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, MARCH 26, 2008 LINE 8. PETITIONERS LELAND PORTEOUS, LELAND F. PORTEOUS, D.D.S., P.C.'S ('DR. LEE') Motion To Enforce Judgment IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES FAILED TO JOINTLY EXECUTE CONTRACT DOCUMENTS CONFORMING TO THE AWARD AS PROVIDED IN PARAGRAPH 2(B) OF THE JANUARY 2005 AWARD. AS A CONSEQUENCE; EACH PARTY MUST ACCEPT THE OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT OR FORFEIT HIS RIGHT TO THE SALE OF THE VALLEJO PRACTICE. ANY SALE OF THE VALLEJO PRACTICE MUST BE DONE IN ACCORDANCE WITH PARAGRAPH SEVENTEEN OF THE DENTAL PRACTICE PARTNERSHIP AGREEMENT FOR VALLEJO DENTAL OFFICE, EXECUTED ON MARCH 10, 1986. PARAGRAPHS TWO AND THREE OF THE JUDGMENT OF AUGUST 9, 2007 ARE NO LONGER APPLICABLE. IN ALL OTHER RESPECTS, THE JUDGMENT REMAINS IN FULL FORCE AND EFFECT. =(302/PJM/AY)
